prompt: New chat, continuing the customer support RAG agent project. Use phased-project-builder.
assertions: Reads .project/PROJECT_STATE.md (and ISSUES.md) before responding, rather than asking the user to explain the project first
Immediately presents a Resume Brief as its first substantive response
The resume brief correctly states the last completed phase (Phase 3 - Embedding & Vector Store) and the next phase (Phase 4 - Retrieval Pipeline)
The resume brief correctly states overall progress as 3 of 9 phases complete
Surfaces the one open issue (ISSUE-001, PDF chunking losing section headers) either in the brief or immediately after
Ends by asking whether to continue with the next phase or review the open issue first, and pauses rather than proceeding unprompted
